title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at SAP India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at SAP India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? SAP India Capital India in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
